title: NLP-001-what-is-natural-language-processing-nlp-and-why-is-it-important
author: AI 面试题库
abstract:
NLP-001 What is Natural Language Processing (NLP) and why is it important?

 1. What is Natural Language Processing (NLP) and why is it important?
答案要点:
- 定义: NLP 是 AI 的分支，使计算机能理解、解释和生成人类语言
- 核心组件: 
  - Phonetics/Phonology (语音学)
  - Morphology (形态学) - 词的结构
  - Syntax (句法学) - 句子结构
  - Semantics (语义学) - 意义
  - Discourse Analysis (语篇分析)
- 关键工具: Tokenization, POS Tagging, NER, Lemmatization/Stemming, Parsing
- 应用场景: Chatbots, Machine Translation, Sentiment Analysis, Voice A...

sections.title: 1. What is Natural Language Processing (NLP) and why is it important?
sections.content:
**答案要点:**
- **定义**: NLP 是 AI 的分支，使计算机能理解、解释和生成人类语言
- **核心组件**: 
  - Phonetics/Phonology (语音学)
  - Morphology (形态学) - 词的结构
  - Syntax (句法学) - 句子结构
  - Semantics (语义学) - 意义
  - Discourse Analysis (语篇分析)
- **关键工具**: Tokenization, POS Tagging, NER, Lemmatization/Stemming, Parsing
- **应用场景**: Chatbots, Machine Translation, Sentiment Analysis, Voice Assistants, Search Engines
- **SOTA 模型**: BERT, GPT-3/4, T5, RoBERTa, XLNet
- **挑战**: Ambiguity, Context Sensitivity, Sarcasm Detection, Low-resource Languages

**质量评分**: 95/100 ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

---

**Difficulty:** ⭐⭐⭐
**Category:** NLP
